creator: js@jschneider.com
text:
EncFS is no longer working on 11.1 STABLE.  I upgraded from 11.1-STABLE r326896 to r330140 and encfs will no longer list any files on the mounted encrypted filesystem.  It mounts with no errors given, but ls and other commands result in no files being found.  I upgraded fusefs-encfs to 1.9.4 but there were no changes in results.

I downgraded back to 11.1 STABLE r326896 and everything was fine again.
